title: Electric vehicle public charging infrastructure statistics: April 2025
body: "Official statistics in development on the number of publicly available electric vehicle charging devices in the UK in April 2025, broken down by local authority.  We welcome feedback on this quarterly publication. If you have any feedback or questions, please contact us.  Data is sourced from the electric vehicle charging point platform Zapmap.  An interactive map of this data is available.   Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to. You are welcome to contact us directly by emailing us with any comments about how we meet these standards.   Contact details   Electric vehicle charging infrastructure statistics     Email evci.stats@dft.gov.uk         "
